common.selectImageFile: Please select an image file (PNG, JPG, etc.).
common.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to upload images.

home.title: Study more effectively
home.subtitle: Build exercises for languages, vocabulary, or any subject. Practice with straight answer or multiple choice, and take timed exams — now online.
home.feature5: Works on any device in the browser
home.feature6: No installation — always up to date

login.checkEmailText: We sent a password reset link to {email}. Click the link in the email to set a new password.
login.passwordUpdated: Password updated. You can now log in.
login.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.
login.authLinkInvalid: The reset link could not be used (it may have expired, or your email app opened it without the full address). Request a new link with “Forgot password?” below, or open the link in Safari, Chrome, or Edge instead of the in-app email browser.

dashboard.noDecksHint: Create a new deck or import an existing PSTUDY .txt file.

deck.fillInstructionPlaceholder: Type once, apply to all items

import.title: Import PSTUDY .txt file
import.dropHint: Drop a .txt file here or click to browse
import.pasteNote: You can also click the box and paste (Ctrl+V).

community.browseHint: Browse decks shared by others. Copy any deck to your collection to edit and practice.
community.shareHint: Share your own decks from the deck editor by turning on "Share with community".
community.title: Community decks

exam.title: Exams
exam.subtitle: Create timed multiple-choice exams from your decks and invite people by email.
exam.promptDescription: Show the explanation; pick the correct description
exam.promptExplanation: Show the description; pick the correct explanation
exam.emailsHint: One per line, or separate with commas
exam.validationOk: This deck is OK to use as a multiple-choice exam.
exam.validationFail: Fix the issues below before you can create the exam.
exam.needTwoItems: Add at least two items to this deck.
exam.inviteHelp: Each examinee has their own link. Copy it and send it any way you like. Use “More…” only if you need a fresh link or to cancel an invite.
exam.reissueDisabledInProgress: Wait until this exam is not in progress before creating a new link.
exam.revokeConfirm: Cancel this invite? This person will not be able to use their link anymore.
exam.noExamsYet: You have not created any exams yet.
exam.schemaMissing: Database tables for exams are not installed yet. In Supabase → SQL Editor, run the script: supabase/exam-schema.sql
exam.takePlaceholder: Timed exam mode for this link will run here. You can close this page for now.
exam.myAssignedExamsHint: Open your exam links to start or resume. Results appear after submission.
exam.noAssignedExams: No exams assigned to your account yet.

examValidation.emptyCorrect: Missing correct answer text for this item.
examValidation.emptyPrompt: Missing question text (opposite field or instruction).
examValidation.notEnoughChoices: Need at least two different answer options (correct + distractors).
examValidation.emptyExpectedForStraight: Missing expected answer for straight-answer grading.

banner.underConstruction: PSTUDY Online is under construction. Features may change.
